Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Starting today, you're free to use your "after school" hours however you wish.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Making use of various school facilities or visiting certain spots in town can raise your {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}, {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}, or {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}However, the number of activities you can engage in each day is limited. Think carefully about how to spend your time and plan ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
